channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Blinken will avoid Ukraine and the Middle East at a divided UN Security Council
item.description: Secretary of State Antony Blinken will make what's likely his final trip in office to the United Nations this week.
item.dc:creator: Edith M. Lederer And Matthew Lee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cómo los CIO resilientes se preparan para el futuro y mitigan los riesgos
item.description: Este año surgieron riesgos derivados de la inteligencia artificial, interrupciones catastróficas como el incidente de CrowdStrike y la superación de las fragilidades de la cadena de suministro de software, así como el riesgo de que los ciberataques y la computación cuántica rompan los algoritmos de
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: The scientists at Hungary’s Eötvos Loránd University have been studying group robotics since 2009, and earlier succeeded in creating the world’s first flock of synchronized drones.
item.dc:creator: Justin Spike, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Self-proclaimed bitcoin inventor Craig Wright faces contempt of court in $1.2 trillion lawsuit
item.description: An Australian computer scientist who claimed he invented bitcoin was on Friday accused of contempt of court after he filed a 911 billion-pound ($1.18 trillion) lawsuit against Twitter founder Jack Dorsey‘s payments firm Block in Britain.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft Revives PC Accessories with Incase Partnership - A New Era Begins
item.description: Microsoft joins forces with Incase to relaunch PC accessories, offering affordable, ergonomic, and wireless options, alongside Surface branding.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Kazakhstan's Carpet CCTV Project: Revolutionizing Public Safety with Technology
item.description: Kazakhstan's Ministry of Internal Affairs is leading the way in public safety technology with its groundbreaking 'Carpet CCTV' project, combining a massive surveillance network with advanced analytics and artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools
item.description: EPA's CIO says modernized tools and integrated teams help the agency meet the changing needs of the public more easily and consistently. The post EPA fosters IT resilience through cloud, integrated teams, automation tools first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: 19 percent in new survey have invested in, traded or used cryptocurrency
item.description: About 1-in-5 voters have invested in, traded or used cryptocurrency, according to a Tuesday poll. The survey from Emerson College Polling found that 19 percent of respondents have traded, invested or used crypto like Bitcoin or Ethereum. About 81 percent have not.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Equinix to end its bare-metal service
item.description: Hosting and colocation giant Equinix is sunsetting its bare-metal infrastructure-as-a-service (IaaS) offering by June 2026. New features will no longer be added to Equinix Metal, as the service was called.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Gemini Code Assist tools target developer productivity from within IDEs
item.description: Google has launched new Gemini Code Assist tools that are designed to help developers improve their productivity from within an integrated development environment (IDE), such as Visual Studio Code or JetBrains.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: DoD edges toward goal of ubiquitous connectivity — connect anything, provide access anywhere
item.description: DoD’s embrace of commercial technologies offers big opportunities but creates new network design and security considerations, Verizon’s Ken Gonzales explains. The post DoD edges toward goal of ubiquitous connectivity — connect anything, provide access anywhere first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate report alleges Amazon rejected warehouse safety recommendations due to productivity concerns
item.description: At least two internal Amazon studies found a link between how quickly the online retailer's warehouse workers perform tasks and workplace injuries, but the company rejected many safety recommendations out of concern the proposed changes might reduce productivity, according to a U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 6 sneaky scams that could ruin your holiday season
item.description: Beware of these six sneaky holiday scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives you tips to avoid falling victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Google, Microsoft could turn gatekeepers for advanced AI chips
item.description: The US government could designate cloud providers including Google and Microsoft as global gatekeepers for advanced AI chips, a step widely viewed as the latest effort to block China’s access to this critical technology, according to a Reuters report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: What IT hiring looks like heading into 2025
item.description: Despite low unemployment in the IT industry, IT hiring has slowed over the past two years and is expected to plateau in 2025 as employers prioritize experienced candidates with specialized skills, according to three new studies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, Fox 5
